title: hub-v3 PR4: flip default, delete v2 conflict machinery, add --finalize
description: Fourth PR of the hub v3 migration (.design/hub-v3-per-agent-refs.md, REQ-10, REQ-11). Make hub_v3 the default, delete recover_from_push_conflict, rebase-retry, clean_dirty_state conflict repair, hub_health_check, verify_cache_worktree, V1 layout support, reconcile_display_counter, dedup_issue_files, counters.json and locks.json schemas, and the hub-cache worktree lifecycle. Add migrate hub-v3 --finalize. Event-log pruning per REQ-11. Acceptance: AC-8, AC-9, AC-10 (grep returns nothing, negative diffstat), AC-11 (smoke suite against GitHub and bare remotes).
